welcome_description:
Hello, {user}

Welcome to **NullScripts**, your hub for automation tools, ethical cybersecurity utilities, and powerful scripting resources.  
We’re excited to have you here — whether you're learning, building, or exploring advanced automation, you’re in the right place.

Before you get started, please take a moment to review the essential information below:

## **📘 Server Rules**
All members must follow our community rules to keep the server safe, organized, and compliant with Discord’s policies.

🔗 **Rules:** https://discord.com/channels/1499639396545335458/1499733708054204568/1499737891343958027

## **🛠️ Tool Usage Guidelines & Terms**
If you plan to use any of our free or paid tools, you must read the guidelines and terms for the tools channel.

🔗 **Tools Guidelines & ToS:** https://discord.com/channels/1499639396545335458/1499736154608504885/1499736458099949690

## **📌 What You Can Expect Here**
- Ethical automation tools  
- Educational cybersecurity resources  
- Free and premium utilities  
- A supportive community of developers and learners  
- Staff ready to help when needed  

## **✔️ Get Started**
Once you’ve reviewed the rules and guidelines, feel free to explore the channels, ask questions, and start building.

Welcome to the community — let’s innovate responsibly.
rules_text: 1. Follow the Discord ToS and Community Guidelines
